name: Belguim Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the dry ingredients into a mixing bowl and blend them.
2. Combine the egg yolks and milk in a separate bowl and stir into the dry ingredients.
3. Stir in the cooking oil.
4. Carefully fold in the egg whites until combined.
5. Do not overmix the batter.
6. Pour approximately 7/8 cup of batter onto the preheated waffle iron grid.
7. Close the waffle maker and bake for about 4 minutes.
8. Serve hot with butter and syrup, or use as a base for various creamed dishes (vegetables, fish, or meat) or top with ice cream and a dessert sauce. Makes 5-6 servings.
Waffle Variations:
- Pecan Waffles: Stir into plain waffle batter before folding in the beaten egg whites, or sprinkle chopped pecans over the batter before closing the waffle maker.
- Cinnamon Waffles: Sift 1 1/2 teaspoons cinnamon with the dry ingredients when preparing the plain waffle batter.
- Apple Waffles: Stir into plain waffle batter before folding in the beaten egg whites and add 2 cups peeled, diced apples.
- Lemon Waffles: Add 2 teaspoons grated lemon rind to the egg yolks, milk mixture in the waffle recipe.
- Bacon Waffles: Stir into plain waffle batter before folding in the beaten egg whites and add 8 slices of pan-fried, crumbled bacon.
- Corn Waffles: Reduce milk to 1 cup; add 2 cups canned cream-style corn and 1-2 teaspoons sugar (to taste) when preparing the plain waffle batter. Bake until thoroughly dry.
- Cheese Waffles: Stir into plain waffle batter before folding in the beaten egg whites and add 1 cup grated processed cheese.
- Ham Waffles: Sprinkle finely diced cooked ham over the batter before closing the waffle maker.
- Chocolate Waffles: Substitute 3 tablespoons cocoa for 3 tablespoons of flour when preparing the plain waffle batter. For Chocolate Chip Waffles, stir into the plain waffle batter before folding in the beaten egg whites and add 3/4 cup chocolate chips.
